title: Ponkapoag Boardwalk is closed until further notice
body: DCR has temporarily closed the Ponkapoag Boardwalk in the Blue Hills Reservation.

title:
Deer Hunting Alert    
    
      
      
        Deer Hunting Alert
body:
Deer Hunting Alert    
    
      
      
        Deer Hunting Alert
      
      
      
          Deer Hunting at Harriman State ParkA portion of Harriman State Park is open for deer hunting to address the loss of forest biodiversity and the lack of tree regeneration due to long-term over-browsing by deer. This year's deer hunting season is weekdays only, excluding holidays, following NYSDEC deer seasons and ends on December 31, 2025. 
Please note, the firearms portion of the Harriman State Pa

title: Deer Hunting at Harriman State ParkA portion of Harriman State Park is open for deer hunting to addr
body:
Deer Hunting at Harriman State ParkA portion of Harriman State Park is open for deer hunting to address the loss of forest biodiversity and the lack of tree regeneration due to long-term over-browsing by deer. This year's deer hunting season is weekdays only, excluding holidays, following NYSDEC deer seasons and ends on December 31, 2025. 
Please note, the firearms portion of the Harriman State Park deer season will run between November 17 and December 31, weekdays only and excluding holidays. P

title:
Camping Alert    
    
      
      
        Camping Alert
      
      
      
          Camping Al
body:
Camping Alert    
    
      
      
        Camping Alert
      
      
      
          Camping AlertShould a bear approach you, make loud noises and slowly back away. Do not run. Never get between cubs and an adult bear. All bear encounters should be reported to the Park Police at (845) 786-2781.
Bear Warning Information

title:
Attention Lake Sebago Users    
    
      
      
        Attention Lake Sebago Users
body:
Attention Lake Sebago Users    
    
      
      
        Attention Lake Sebago Users
      
      
      
          Hydrilla, a federally listed aquatic invasive species, was found in Lake Sebago in late 2022. If left unmanaged this aquatic plant can severely impact water quality and recreation. State Parks is implementing a 5-year treatment plan starting early June 2023. Yellow notice signs will be placed at public access points.
More information: https://littlebearenvironmental.com/lake-seba

Hydrilla, a federally listed aquatic invasive species, was found in Lake Sebago in late 2022. If left unmanaged this aquatic plant can severely impact water quality and recreation. More information: https://littlebearenvironmental.com/lake-sebago-hydrilla-control-project/

body:

          Sterling Forest State Park trails are now open with the following exceptions:

Bare Rock trail WEST of W Valley trail, including the Vista Point - CLOSED
Fire Tower trail EAST of Lakeville trail - CLOSED
Fire Tower trail WEST of Sterling Ridge trail - CLOSED
Lake to Lake trail - CLOSED
Sterling Ridge trail SOUTH of Fire Tower trail - CLOSED

title:
Martin Dunham Reservoir: Unsafe Ice    
    
      
      
        Martin Dunham Reservoir: Unsafe I
body:
Martin Dunham Reservoir: Unsafe Ice    
    
      
      
        Martin Dunham Reservoir: Unsafe Ice
      
      
      
          Martin Dunham Reservoir: Unsafe IceALERT: Ice on the Martin Dunham Reservoir is unsafe for recreation this winter. A valve in the dam must remain open throughout winter to relieve pressure on the structure, which may cause unstable ice. Stay off ice.

  
      
      
          Posted December 5, 2025 3:00 pm
